claims.summary: Transitions should be durable replyable objects rather than telemetry side effects.
claims.disposition: verify current phase cards, witnesses, answers, and right-to-ignore queues

claims.summary: A transition needs transient identity, visibility, duration, vectors, persistence, and solo or joint state.
claims.disposition: verify current transition_id, shared_transition_id, transition_visibility, duration, vector, and persistence fields

claims.summary: Moment capture and language-only transition cards can test shared orientation.
Automatic telemetry transition detection or phase-driven behavior would change live operation.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 cadence, behavior, and controller work
